15.reason: [The condition checks only one side of the range (e.g., ch[i-1] >= 'a' but doesn't ensure ch[i+1] >= 'a'), so it may incorrectly allow mixed-type expansions like 'a-Z'. It should verify both characters are of the same category.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition checks only one side of the range (e.g., ch[i-1] >= 'a' but doesn't ensure ch[i+1] >= 'a'), so it may incorrectly allow mixed-type expansions like 'a-Z'. It should verify both characters are of the same category.]
